retrieved_result: Just three pull-ups: Too many for women in the Marine Corps? The Marine Corps reports that most women in recruit training are unable to do the minimum three pull-ups. As the US military moves toward allowing more women in combat roles, this raises questions about physical standards. By Brad Knicker
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses military physical fitness standards, not API debugging or API integration; it is not relevant to the query.
